Disclaimer
This resume was made with the R package pagedown.
Last updated on 2022-07-02.



Main

Pedro Mendes
I have two year’s experience in the IT market, working with technical support for operating systems, and basic administrative tasks, and four months as an economic analyst, also working with data science. I was a researcher in the university’s scientific initiation program, and I am currently in the 12th period of Sciences and Humanities and the 7th period of the Economics. My interests are econometrics, economic modeling, applied microeconomics, machine learning, Linux systems, and programming in R, Python, Shell Script and Emacs.

Research

Scientific Initiation Program (PIC-UFABC)
CECS - UFABC
São Bernardo do Campo, SP
2021 - 2020

I researched brazilian and the Central-West exports, as well as the commodity cycle of the 2000s and its relationship with the region’s agro-industrial complex. To do this, I used data from Comex Stats and analyzed data using R.

Economic analyst
Abramge
São Paulo, SP
Now - 2022

Data processing and package creation in R, creation and maintenance of SQL databases, analysis and interpretation of public data from the supplementary health sector, elaboration of reports on the sector, creation of dashboards using the Shiny package, and elaboration of statistical models for the sector.
